title: SSC Selection Post Phase XIV 2026 Notification
pattern_table:
Subject|Questions|Marks
General Intelligence|25|50
General Awareness|25|50
Quantitative Aptitude|25|50
English Language|25|50
instructions: Apply online at ssc.gov.in. One-time registration (OTR) is mandatory.
selection_process: Computer Based Examination (CBE) scheduled for May/June 2026.
job_description: Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released the 2026 calendar. This recruitment covers Phase XIV selection posts for various central government departments.

title: RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) 2026 Cycle
age_limit: 18-35 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories.
qualification: Matriculation / SSLC plus ITI from recognized institutions of NCVT/SCVT.
pattern_table:
Stage|Subject|Marks
CBT-1|Maths, Reasoning, Science, GA|75
CBT-2|Part A (Technical) & Part B|175
instructions: Medical standards for ALP are very strict. Candidates must have distance vision 6/6 without glasses.
selection_process: CBT-1, CBT-2, Computer Based Aptitude Test (CBAT), and Medical Exam.
job_description: Indian Railways announces the mega recruitment drive for ALPs in 2026. High focus on safety and technical standards.

title: IBPS CRP Clerk XV Recruitment 2026
qualification: Degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a recognized University.
pattern_table:
Test|No. of Qs|Max Marks|Time
English Language|30|30|20 Min
Numerical Ability|35|35|20 Min
Reasoning Ability|35|35|20 Min
instructions: Registration is through IBPS official portal. Candidates must have a valid personal email ID.
selection_process: Two-tier online examination (Preliminary and Main) scheduled for August 2026.
job_description: IBPS is conducting the Common Recruitment Process for selection of Clerical cadre posts in participating banks for the 2026-27 financial year.

title: UPSC National Defence Academy (NDA) I 2026
age_limit: Only unmarried male/female candidates born not earlier than 02nd Jan 2007.
qualification: 12th Class pass for Army, Physics & Maths mandatory for Air Force/Navy.
pattern_table:
Subject|Duration|Maximum Marks
Mathematics|2.5 Hours|300
General Ability Test|2.5 Hours|600
instructions: Candidates will be selected based on Written Exam and SSB Interview.
selection_process: Written Examination and SSB Interview (Personality Test).
job_description: Join the Indian Armed Forces through NDA in the 2026 intake. prestigious career as a commissioned officer.

title: SBI Probationary Officers (PO) 2026 Intake
qualification: Graduation in any discipline. Those in the final year can also apply.
pattern_table:
Phase|Test|Marks|Duration
I|English Language|30|20 Min
I|Quantitative Aptitude|35|20 Min
I|Reasoning Ability|35|20 Min
instructions: Guidelines for scanning and uploading of Photograph and Signature must be followed strictly.
selection_process: Phase I: Prelims, Phase II: Mains (Objective + Descriptive), Phase III: Psychometric Test & Interview.
job_description: SBI invites applications for the post of Probationary Officers. Exceptional career path for management-oriented graduates.

title: RRB NTPC Graduate & Undergraduate Posts 2026
age_limit: 18-33 years. Standard relaxations as per RRB rules.
qualification: Degree for Graduate posts, 12th for Undergraduate posts.
pattern_table:
Stage|Subject|Questions|Marks
CBT-1|Maths, Reasoning, GA|100|100
CBT-2|Advanced Maths, Reasoning, GA|120|120
instructions: Multiple regional RRBs. Choose zone carefully as it cannot be changed.
selection_process: Two stage CBT, Typing/Skill test (for specific posts) and Medical exam.
job_description: Indian Railways NTPC 2026 notification for various categories including Station Master, Guards, and Clerks.

title: OPSC Odisha Civil Services 2026
age_limit: 21-38 years. Relaxation for SC/ST is 5 years.
qualification: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University.
pattern_table:
Stage|Paper|Marks|Duration
Prelims|GS I|200|2 Hours
Prelims|GS II (CSAT)|200|2 Hours
instructions: Must be able to read, write and speak Odia.
selection_process: Preliminary Exam, Main Exam (Descriptive) and Personality Test.
job_description: Odisha Public Service Commission (OPSC) invites applications for the most prestigious state civil services examination.

title: APPSC Group 1 Services 2026
qualification: Any Degree from a recognized University.
pattern_table:
Stage|Subject|Marks
Prelims|GS & Mental Ability|240
Mains|Papers I-V|750
instructions: Screening test will be objective. Mains will be descriptive.
selection_process: Screening Test, Main Examination and Oral Test (Interview).
job_description: Andhra Pradesh Public Service Commission (APPSC) Group 1 services recruitment for top executive positions in AP State Govt.

title: TSPSC Group 2 Recruitment 2026
age_limit: 18-44 years. Age relaxation as per rules.
qualification: A Bachelor's degree from any recognized University.
pattern_table:
Paper|Subject|Marks
I|General Studies|150
II|History & Constitution|150
III|Economy & Development|150
IV|Telangana Movement|150
instructions: OTR (One Time Registration) in TSPSC portal is mandatory.
selection_process: Objective Type Examination (4 papers). No Interview.
job_description: Telangana State Public Service Commission (TSPSC) notification for various executive and non-executive Group 2 posts.

title: Air Force Agniveervayu 2026 Intake
qualification: 10+2 with Maths, Physics, English OR 3 years Diploma in Engineering.
pattern_table:
Subject|Duration|Marks
Science Subjects|60 Mins|70
Other than Science|45 Mins|50
instructions: Mandatory medical and physical fitness standards apply.
selection_process: Online Test, Physical Fitness Test (PFT), and Adaptability Tests.
job_description: Indian Air Force recruitment for Agniveervayu under the Agnipath scheme for the 2026 batch.
